description: A canister of pressurized hydrogen so heavily compressed it has turned solid.  With proper equipment, it could be heated into plasma.

A millimeter-scale fusion target pellet. The core contains compressed, frozen fusion material, encased in a stabilizing shell of energetic nanocompound. When subjected to high-voltage discharge, the nanocompound lattice implodes, producing an effect analogous to intense electromagnetic compression and laser ignition, it undergoes micro-inertial confinement fusion.

A specialized, high-density magazine designed to hold and align micro-fusion target pellets. It contains the necessary capacitive contacts and magnetic shielding to safely transfer the rifle's high-voltage discharge to the pellets without premature detonation.
